---
title: "Main Script"
format: html
---

## Load packages
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

## Source custom funcitions
```{r}
source('./Functions.R')
```

Calculate BMI
```{r}
cal_BMI(weight="70", height=1.75)
```
```{r}
cal_BMI(weight=70, height=0)
```
```{r}
cal_BMI(weight=200, height=1.3)
```












Estimate age in year 2026, born in 1997
```{r}
est_age(current_year = 2026, birth_year = 1997)
```
